scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const cp = require('child_process'); if (fs.existsSync('../kmarket.example')) { console.log('Building frontend...'); cp.execSync('npm install --prefix ../kmarket.example && npm run build --prefix ../kmarket.example', {stdio: 'inherit'}); fs.mkdirSync('./public', { recursive: true }); if (process.platform === 'win32') { cp.execSync('xcopy /E /I /Y ..\\kmarket.example\\dist .\\public', {stdio: 'inherit'}); } else { cp.execSync('cp -r ../kmarket.example/dist/* ./public/', {stdio: 'inherit'}); } } else { console.log('Frontend folder not found, skipping frontend build.'); }"
scripts.start: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('./public')) fs.mkdirSync('./public');" && npm run build && tsx src/index.ts
